scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个摆满各种瓶装和盒装饮料的商用冷藏展示柜或自动售货机的内部货架，饮料种类繁多，包括果汁、奶制品、茶饮和碳酸饮料等，包装形态各异。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is the interior shelving of a commercial refrigerated display case or vending machine, fully stocked with a wide variety of bottled and carton beverages, including juices, dairy products, teas, and sodas in various packaging types.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 一瓶包装主要是深蓝色且印有醒目白色大写英文字母“AMX”的细长型塑料酸奶饮料。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A slender plastic yogurt drink bottle with primarily dark blue packaging and prominent white uppercase English letters 'AMX' printed on it.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 一个长方体的黄色纸盒装茶饮料，包装上印有绿色的叶子图案和显眼的深色粗体文字。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A rectangular yellow carton tea beverage with green leaf patterns and conspicuous bold dark text printed on the packaging.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 一盒正面斜贴着一根带着透明塑料外包装的白色细长吸管的浅色方形纸盒饮品。
object_descriptions.short_en: carton drink with an attached straw
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A light-colored square carton drink with a long, thin white straw in a clear plastic wrapper taped diagonally across its front.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 一罐体积较小、通体红色的细长圆柱形金属易拉罐装饮料，夹杂在众多纸盒包装之间。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A relatively small, slender, cylindrical red metal can beverage, interspersed among numerous carton packages.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 一个夹在透明塑料挡板边缘处的黑色金属长尾票夹，带有两个银色的金属把手。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A black metal binder clip attached to the edge of a clear plastic baffle, featuring two silver metal handles.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个布置成卧室的场景，一张铺着蓝色格子床单的单人床上躺着一个男性人体模型。模型穿着深蓝色T恤、戴着帽子，身上盖着带有花纹的浅褐色被子。床边有一个木制床头柜，上面放着一瓶花和几张纸片，背景是深色的窗帘。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a bedroom-like scene featuring a male mannequin lying on a single bed with a blue checkered bedsheet. The mannequin is wearing a dark blue t-shirt and a hat, covered with a light brown patterned blanket. Next to the bed is a wooden nightstand holding a vase of flowers and some pieces of paper, with dark curtains in the background.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 穿在人体模型身上的一件印有醒目的白色“PEKING UNIVERSITY”英文字母的深蓝色短袖T恤。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A dark blue short-sleeved t-shirt with prominent white 'PEKING UNIVERSITY' English lettering worn by the mannequin.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在木制床头柜上的一个插着多朵色彩鲜艳的人造花束的深色圆形玻璃花瓶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A dark, round glass vase containing a colorful bouquet of artificial flowers, placed on the wooden nightstand.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 戴在假人模型头上的一顶带有细微毛呢质感的灰色复古风贝雷帽。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A grey vintage-style beret with a subtle woolen texture worn on the head of the dummy model.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 印在浅褐色印花被套边缘处的一个小巧的棕色卡通小熊头部图案。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A small brown cartoon bear head pattern printed near the edge of the light brown printed duvet cover.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 平铺散落在床边木质柜子平整台面上的几张淡黄色的方形薄纸片中的一张。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: One of the few light yellow square pieces of thin paper scattered flat on the smooth surface of the wooden cabinet next to the bed.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个略显杂乱的室内台面场景，铺着黑白格子桌布的桌子上摆放着微波炉、保温壶、路由器以及一些零食和杂物，旁边还能看到洗手池的一角和一些拆开的包装材料。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a somewhat cluttered indoor countertop scene. A table covered with a black-and-white checkered tablecloth holds a microwave, thermal carafes, a router, along with some snacks and miscellaneous items. A corner of a washbasin and some opened packaging materials are also visible nearby.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 一台表面带有反光玻璃门和右侧按键控制面板的银色不锈钢外壳微波炉。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A silver stainless steel microwave with a reflective glass door and a button control panel on the right side.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在微波炉上方的一个带有把手和深色盖子的高个子浅绿色保温水壶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A tall, light green thermal carafe with a handle and a dark lid, placed on top of the microwave.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 亮着两颗蓝色指示灯并带有四根竖立天线的扁平状白色无线网络路由器。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A flat white wireless network router with two glowing blue indicator lights and four upright antennas.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 压在红色泡面桶上方的一盒印有饼干图案和黑色中文字体的黄色长方形纸质包装盒。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A yellow rectangular paper packaging box printed with biscuit patterns and black Chinese characters, resting on top of a red instant noodle cup.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 随意倒放在微波炉正前方的格子桌布上的一个带有白色盖子的小型绿色圆柱形胶棒。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A small green cylindrical glue stick with a white cap, lying casually on the checkered tablecloth directly in front of the microwave.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个杂乱的室内空间，看起来像是一个兼作卧室的办公室。一张玻璃桌面上堆满了笔记本电脑、外接键盘、鼠标垫、风扇、纸巾盒以及各种饮料瓶和数据线。背景中有一张单人床，床上躺着一个假人模型，左侧的办公椅上也坐着另一个假人模型，右侧则有一张皮沙发。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a cluttered indoor space that appears to function as both a bedroom and an office. A glass table is heavily laden with a laptop, external keyboard, mousepad, fan, tissue box, along with various beverage bottles and charging cables. In the background, there is a single bed with a mannequin lying on it, another mannequin sitting on an office chair to the left, and a leather sofa on the right.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在黑色外接键盘旁边的一块印有黄色卡通动物大头图案的色彩鲜艳的鼠标垫。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A brightly colored mousepad printed with a large yellow cartoon animal head pattern, placed next to the black external keyboard.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在玻璃桌面靠近沙发那一侧的一个带有提手装置的大容量浅绿色不锈钢保温杯。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A large-capacity light green stainless steel tumbler with a handle mechanism, placed on the glass tabletop near the sofa side.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 摆放在桌面上几瓶饮料和一堆杂乱的白色充电头旁边的一台带有圆形底座的白色网罩迷你电风扇。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A white mini electric fan with a circular base and mesh cover, placed on the desk next to a few beverage bottles and a messy pile of white charging blocks.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 躲在笔记本电脑屏幕后方、紧挨着一个透明玻璃空瓶放置的微型黄色卡通小人摆件。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A miniature yellow cartoon figurine hiding behind the laptop screen, placed right next to an empty clear glass bottle.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 穿在坐在办公椅上的那个人体模型左脚上的一只粉色塑料凉拖鞋。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A pink plastic slide slipper worn on the left foot of the mannequin sitting on the office chair.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个室内角落场景，靠墙摆放着一台白色滚筒洗衣机，上方放着一瓶鲜艳的插花。洗衣机旁边的一把黑色办公椅上，坐着一个造型奇特的人体模型，它戴着灰色卷发和墨镜，穿着酒红色T恤和蓝色短裤，背景有窗户和深色窗帘。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is an indoor corner scene featuring a white front-loading washing machine placed against the wall, with a vase of vibrant flowers on top of it. Sitting on a black office chair next to the washing machine is a peculiarly styled mannequin wearing a grey curly wig, sunglasses, a maroon t-shirt, and blue shorts, with a window and dark curtains in the background.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 穿在坐在办公椅上的人体模型身上的一件印有白色“PEKING UNIVERSITY”英文字母的酒红色短袖T恤。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A maroon short-sleeved t-shirt with white 'PEKING UNIVERSITY' English lettering worn by the mannequin sitting on the office chair.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 靠墙摆放的一个带有圆形黑色舱门和顶部控制旋钮的白色外壳滚筒洗衣机。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A white front-loading washing machine with a circular black door and top control knobs, placed against the wall.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 平稳放置在白色洗衣机顶部正中央的那个插着许多颜色各异的人造花朵的深蓝色透明玻璃花瓶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A dark blue transparent glass vase containing many artificial flowers of various colors, placed steadily in the top center of the white washing machine.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 戴在人体模型脸部、被灰白色的蓬松卷曲假发稍微遮挡住的一副黑色边框墨镜。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A pair of black-framed sunglasses worn on the mannequin's face, slightly obscured by a fluffy grey curly wig.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 插在洗衣机侧后方墙壁白色插座面板上的那个连着黑色线缆的蓝色塑料电源插头。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A blue plastic power plug connected to a black cable, plugged into the white wall outlet panel behind and to the side of the washing machine.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个非常反常规的室内空间，一个白色的马桶和一个白色的立柱式洗手池被直接放置在了一个装满饮料的商用冷藏展示柜旁边，旁边还能看到铺着黑白格子桌布的台面一角。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a highly unconventional indoor space where a white toilet and a white pedestal sink are placed directly next to a commercial refrigerated display case filled with beverages. A corner of a surface covered with a black-and-white checkered tablecloth is also visible nearby.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 紧挨着装满饮料的冷藏展示柜侧面摆放的一个盖着盖子的白色陶瓷马桶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A white ceramic toilet with its lid closed, placed right next to the side of the refrigerated display case filled with drinks.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在马桶旁边靠墙位置的一个还没有安装水龙头的白色陶瓷立柱式洗手池。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A white ceramic pedestal sink without a faucet installed, placed against the wall next to the toilet.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在冷藏展示柜最下层、紧挨着一罐黄色饮料旁边的那罐带有醒目白色字母的红色金属易拉罐。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The red metal can with prominent white letters placed on the bottom shelf of the refrigerated display case, right next to a yellow beverage can.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 那个位于白色陶瓷洗手池盆底最低处的圆形排水孔洞。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The circular drain hole located at the lowest point of the basin in the white ceramic sink.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 贴在白色马桶水箱正面偏中间位置的一张带有图案的细长方形小贴纸。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A small, narrow rectangular sticker with a pattern, affixed near the center on the front of the white toilet tank.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个稍显拥挤的办公室角落场景。白色的带抽屉储物柜上放置着一台黑色的打印机，柜子下方及旁边的地面上堆放着多个装有打印纸和杂物的纸箱。紧挨着柜子是一面带有金属边框的工位挡板，透过挡板可以看到办公桌上摆放着显示器、笔记本电脑以及几瓶饮用水。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a slightly crowded office corner scene. A black printer sits on a white storage cabinet with a drawer, while multiple cardboard boxes containing printer paper and miscellaneous items are piled on the floor below and beside it. Right next to the cabinet is a cubicle partition with a metal frame, through which a monitor, a laptop, and several bottles of drinking water can be seen on the desk.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 平放在地面棕色大纸箱顶部的一盒印有醒目“Double A”字样的蓝白配色A4打印纸包装盒。
object_descriptions.short_en: blue and white printer paper box
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A blue and white A4 printer paper packaging box with prominent 'Double A' lettering, resting flat on top of a large brown cardboard box on the floor.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在白色储物柜台面上的一台顶部散落着几张白纸的黑色多功能办公打印机。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A black multi-function office printer with a few sheets of white paper scattered on its top, placed on the surface of the white storage cabinet.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在工位挡板后方的办公桌面上、紧挨着另一瓶大瓶装水摆放的那个带有红色瓶盖和红色标签的透明塑料水瓶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A clear plastic water bottle with a red cap and a red label, placed on the desk behind the cubicle partition, right next to another large bottle of water.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 一端抵在地面、整体斜靠在白色储物柜侧面和办公区工位挡板之间的一个细长的白色长条形管状物体。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A slender, long white tubular object with one end resting on the floor, leaning diagonally between the side of the white storage cabinet and the office cubicle partition.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 插在靠近地面纸箱堆左侧的白色墙壁面板插座上的那个带着一段黑色线缆的黑色电源插座头。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A black power plug with a segment of black cable attached, inserted into the white wall outlet panel to the left of the cardboard boxes near the floor.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个典型的现代办公桌位场景，L型白色办公桌面上摆放着双显示器、键盘、鼠标、闭合的笔记本电脑以及几瓶饮料和小零食，桌下有一台亮着RGB灯效的电脑主机，桌子一侧放着一个黑色双肩包，前方有一把黑色办公椅。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a typical modern office workstation scene. An L-shaped white desk holds dual monitors, a keyboard, mice, a closed laptop, and several beverage bottles and snacks. Under the desk is a computer tower with RGB lighting, a black backpack is placed on one side of the desk, and a black office chair is positioned in front.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在显示着紫红色水母壁纸的显示器正下方的一个装有橘黄色液体并带有黄色瓶盖的透明塑料瓶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A clear plastic bottle containing orange liquid with a yellow cap, placed directly under the monitor displaying a purple jellyfish wallpaper.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在办公桌靠隔板那一侧、紧挨着显示着网页文档的显示器摆放的那个鼓鼓囊囊的黑色帆布双肩背包。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The bulging black canvas backpack placed on the desk near the partition, right next to the monitor displaying a web page document.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在两台显示器屏幕中间交界处前方的那个带有绿色瓶盖和绿色标签的透明塑料矿泉水瓶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A clear plastic water bottle with a green cap and green label, placed in front of the junction between the two monitor screens.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在白色L型办公桌下方地面上、内部透出红蓝紫渐变RGB灯光的黑色方形电脑主机箱。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A black square computer tower case placed on the floor under the white L-shaped desk, emitting red, blue, and purple gradient RGB lights from inside.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 搁置在闭合的深灰色笔记本电脑金属外壳上、连着一堆黑色散乱线缆的那个长方体黑色电源适配器模块。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A rectangular black power adapter brick attached to a bunch of scattered black cables, resting on the metal cover of the closed dark grey laptop.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个堆满各种设备和个人物品的办公桌位。L型的白色桌面上摆放着多台显示器、键盘、鼠标和头戴式耳机。桌面的一侧展示着几个动漫手办和装在透明盒子里的拼搭玩具，桌下有一台黑色的电脑主机，前方放置着一把黑色的网眼人体工学办公椅。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is an office workstation crowded with various devices and personal items. Multiple monitors, a keyboard, a mouse, and an over-ear headset are placed on the L-shaped white desk. One side of the desk displays several anime figures and a building block toy in a clear case, with a black computer tower on the floor underneath and a black mesh ergonomic office chair positioned in front.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 屏幕亮着并且显示着带有时间和日期的蓝色波浪图案壁纸的那台电脑显示器。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The computer monitor with its screen turned on, displaying a blue wavy pattern wallpaper along with the time and date.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 随意平放在带有巨大白色字母Logo的黑色鼠标垫上的那副黑色头戴式隔音耳机。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The pair of black over-ear noise-canceling headphones lying casually flat on the black mousepad featuring a large white letter logo.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 摆放在办公桌边缘、内部装有一个由拼搭积木组成的宇航员模型的透明亚克力方形展示罩。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A clear acrylic square display cover placed near the edge of the desk, containing an astronaut model made of building blocks inside.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在白色机械键盘侧后方、带着配套底碟并且杯身印有黑色花纹图案的陶瓷杯。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A ceramic cup with black patterned designs on its body and a matching saucer, positioned to the side and slightly behind the white mechanical keyboard.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在黑色鼠标垫上、刚好介于那副黑色头戴式耳机和一盒白色纸巾之间的小型白色无线鼠标。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A small white wireless mouse placed on the black mousepad, situated exactly between the pair of black over-ear headphones and a box of white tissues.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个典型的现代多屏办公桌场景，白色的L型桌面上摆放着三台状态各异的显示器、键盘和鼠标，且铺着一张带有风景图案的大号鼠标垫。桌面上还散落着粉色水杯、头戴式耳机、红色笔记本以及一个放置了各种零食和杂物的黑色桌面增高架，前方有一把灰黑配色的办公椅。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a typical modern multi-monitor office desk scene. An L-shaped white desk holds three monitors in various states, a keyboard, and a mouse, resting on a large mousepad with a landscape pattern. Scattered across the desk are a pink tumbler, an over-ear headset, a red notebook, and a black desktop riser shelf holding various snacks and miscellaneous items, with a grey and black office chair in front.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在黑色长条形键盘旁边、带有一个黑色把手和一根吸管的高个子浅粉色不锈钢保温杯。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A tall, light pink stainless steel tumbler with a black handle and a straw, placed next to the long black keyboard.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 随意平放在带有风景图案的大鼠标垫上、带着一根麦克风杆的粉白相间头戴式游戏耳机。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A pink and white over-ear gaming headset with a microphone boom, lying casually flat on the large landscape-patterned mousepad.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 压在一条白色长线缆下方、紧挨着那副粉白配色头戴式耳机摆放的红色硬质封面笔记本。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A red hardcover notebook resting right next to the pink and white headset, partially pinned under a long white cable.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在白色办公桌台面最外侧边缘、杯身印有橙色水果图案的白色陶瓷马克杯。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A white ceramic mug with orange fruit patterns on its body, placed on the outermost edge of the white office desk surface.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 散落在黑色桌面增高架边缘处的一小包红色塑料包装的零食。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A small red plastic snack packet scattered on the edge of the black desktop riser shelf.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个非常杂乱的室内角落场景，似乎正在进行物品整理或搬迁。画面中有一张灰色的布艺沙发，旁边靠墙堆放着许多大大小小的硬纸板箱、一个装满物品的大号牛皮纸袋和一个小型银色双门冰箱。窗户旁边的桌子或置物架上密集地堆满了书籍、零食包装、电源线和各类生活杂物。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is a highly cluttered indoor corner scene, appearing to be in the midst of organizing or moving. The frame features a grey fabric sofa, next to which are stacked numerous large and small cardboard boxes, a large brown paper bag filled with items, and a small silver double-door refrigerator against the wall. A desk or shelf near the window is densely packed with books, snack packaging, power cables, and various daily sundries.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 平稳地放置在灰色布艺沙发的浅蓝色圆形坐垫上面的那个浅绿色方形布面抱枕。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The light green square fabric throw pillow placed steadily on top of the light blue round cushion on the grey fabric sofa.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 靠墙摆放在那堆高高的硬纸板箱旁边、顶部放着一个白色塑料储物盒的银色双门迷你冰箱。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The silver double-door mini refrigerator placed against the wall next to the tall stack of cardboard boxes, with a white plastic storage box resting on its top.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 孤零零地立在白色窗台边缘、紧挨着玻璃窗格的一瓶带有蓝色标签的透明塑料矿泉水。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue label standing alone on the edge of the white windowsill, right next to the glass windowpane.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在靠墙那个堆满杂物的桌面上、压在几本书籍和纸张上面的那个长方体黑色电源适配器模块。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A rectangular black power adapter block placed on the cluttered desk against the wall, resting on top of a few books and papers.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 挤在桌面上杂乱的包装纸袋和透明塑料盒之间、带有黄色图案的红色圆形方便面纸桶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A red circular instant noodle paper cup with yellow patterns, squeezed between messy paper packaging bags and clear plastic boxes on the desk.

scene_understanding.description_zh: 这是一个极其杂乱的室内书桌或置物台场景，紧挨着灰色布艺沙发和金属文件柜。桌面上堆满了书籍、文件收纳盒、靠垫、颈枕，以及泡面、饮料瓶、水杯等各类生活和办公杂物，后方靠墙还立着几个大型的电子产品包装纸箱。
scene_understanding.description_en: This is an extremely cluttered indoor desk or utility table scene, situated right next to a grey fabric sofa and a metal filing cabinet. The tabletop is piled high with books, a file organizer, cushions, a neck pillow, as well as various daily and office sundries like instant noodles, beverage bottles, and mugs, with several large electronic product packaging boxes standing against the wall behind it.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放置在杂乱桌面边缘、紧挨着灰色布艺沙发靠背的那个印有黄色字体的红色圆形方便面纸桶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The red circular instant noodle paper cup with yellow text, placed on the edge of the cluttered desk right next to the backrest of the grey fabric sofa.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 放在灰色金属文件柜台面上、旁边散落着几根吸管和饮料瓶的那个带有同色系盖子和把手的白色水杯。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The white mug with a matching lid and handle, placed on the surface of the grey metal filing cabinet with a few straws and beverage bottles scattered nearby.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 倚靠在黑色人体工学靠背垫前方、表面为浅蓝色和深蓝色拼接设计的柔软U型护颈枕。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The soft U-shaped neck pillow with a light blue and dark blue spliced design, leaning against the front of a black ergonomic back cushion.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 叠放在红色泡面桶旁边、由上下两个灰色圆形碗状结构扣合在一起的亚光材质储物盒或餐盒。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: The matte storage box or lunch box formed by clasping two grey round bowl-like structures together, stacked right next to the red instant noodle cup.

object_descriptions.detailed_zh: 挤在白色水杯和一堆杂乱的文具之间、带有一个醒目黄色塑料盖的透明饮料瓶。
object_descriptions.detailed_en: A clear beverage bottle with a conspicuous yellow plastic cap, squeezed between the white mug and a messy pile of stationery.
